title: Building An Awesome Model Engine Moyustore Model DM13 1 - In line 4 Cylinder Car Engine
description:
The website for this company is www.moyustore.com - they have a nice range of models like here
https://www.moyustore.com/collections/3d-metal-puzzle and here https://www.moyustore.com/collections/teching-assembly-model
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
Don't forget that you can buy materials for your own experiments including our conductive inks at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/
